finding_results.notes: Replaced recap-only fallout with a live multi-stakeholder containment call where legal/council/agency issue concrete demands, Ina takes an explicit opposing stance on-record, and her outbound permissions are immediately restricted.

Rendered coercion mechanics on-page: Choi invokes Option Trigger Clause 11.2 and specific debt acceleration terms, Ji-eun's bodily distress is shown in real time, and immediate logistical controls follow.

Converted promise-only beat into action chain: Ina commits to creating a trail at the promise scene and later executes a risky, externally verifiable compliance filing with attachments, recipients, and case receipt tied directly to protecting Ji-eun.

summary: Chapter 4 now resolves all packet findings by replacing summarized fallout with dramatized coercive confrontation, surfacing explicit leverage mechanisms and bodily/logistical consequences, and adding a concrete high-risk protective action by Ina that is externally verifiable and causally tied to her promise to Ji-eun.
